summary: PFE is currently in an uptrend with the last price slightly below the 20-day simple moving average (SMA). The stock has established support at 24.6766 and resistance at 28.75.

report.market_structure: The stock is in an uptrend, but the proximity to the 20-day SMA suggests caution for short-term trades.

entry_exit_framing.entry: Consider entering near support at 24.6766 or on a breakout above resistance at 28.75.
entry_exit_framing.exit: Monitor for signs of reversal or weakness if the price approaches resistance.

report.invalidation: A close below the support level of 24.6766 would invalidate the bullish outlook.
